missions.name: Ward Feedstock
missions.description: The practice needs ordinary asteroid feedstock for quiet repairs around the patient ward. No pedigree required, just a clean manifest.

missions.name: Greenhouse Glass Batch
missions.description: Olivine-rich ore for a small run of radiation-tinted greenhouse glass. Yamada wants the batch kept separate from industrial stock.

missions.name: Cryogenic Reagent Shipment
missions.description: Primordial water-ice for the suspension cylinders beneath Yamada Farms. Bring it fresh, sealed, and very cold.
